import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { PATHS } from '../../router/paths'; import './style.css'; const preferenceLabels = { light: 'Light mode', dark: 'Dark mode', system: 'System mode', }; const activeThemeLabels = { light: 'Light theme is active now', dark: 'Dark theme is active now', }; export default function SettingsPage({ themePreference, activeTheme, onToggleTheme }) { return (

Settings

Control the workspace experience

Adjust how the dashboard feels, review the current appearance mode, and jump quickly to the main working areas.

{preferenceLabels[themePreference]} {activeThemeLabels[activeTheme]}

Appearance

Theme mode

The theme button cycles between Light, Dark, and System. System follows your device setting automatically.

{preferenceLabels[themePreference]}

Quick Links

Open important pages faster

Dashboard See the overall workspace summary. Tasks Manage daily todos and filters. Notes Create and edit saved notes. Profile Update profile details and focus areas.
); }
